---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour in NovaSupport
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages, screenshots, or console output if relevant.

## Environment

- Area: Frontend / Backend / Contract (delete as appropriate)
- Browser (if frontend): e.g. Chrome 123, Firefox 124
- Node version (if backend): e.g. 20.11.0
- OS: e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem. Links to related issues or PRs are welcome.
